subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! Night and day ye stand in this presence, and morn and eve ye gather in this assembly, let not a moment pass from your remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی شب و روز در این محضرید و صبح و شام حاضر انجمن دمی از یاد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
